In addition to repealing this section, redesignated part C of title I of as part C of title IV of and renumbered the sections within that part. As a result, a new was created at the same time this section 442 was repealed. The new part C of title IV of has been editorially transferred in the Code from this part to part C (§ 1087–51 et seq.) of subchapter IV of chapter 28 of Title 20, Education, and the new section 442 is classified to .section 131 of Pub.
